author: @tikaanipippin
text: I often find Sky+HD discarded receiver boxes - which have very usable 500GB Seagate HDDs inside. They are designed and made for always-on video use and less than 5% typically have faults. Occasionally 1TB Virgin Tivo and smaller capacity Freeview recordable boxes come to light too. The number of discarded PC desktop boxes seem to be getting fewer though. Plenty of working TVs are dumped so there is no need for dedicated monitors, and living in a University town, in July, and August, student house landlords dump out left behind printers, cables, keyboards, routers, and all manner of other electronics, like home theatre systems. It's a bit like an extra Christmas every year.
